summary.why: Workset SHAs can disappear after rebase, squash, shallow cloning, or pruning, so downstream person-level credit needs a capture-time identity snapshot rather than a later Git or LLM join.
summary.how: Added optional v1 contributors with stable provenance, mailmap-normalized Git authors and Co-authored-by trailers, explicit replacement via --who, retroactive amend support, direct query/draft serialization, and squash-plus-prune coverage.

notes: Kept the contract domain-neutral and additive. Explicit --who replaces the complete automatic set to avoid ambiguous merge semantics. Valid bot identities remain identities; downstream person views must match a known-human roster instead of guessing.
